_description: Rust workspace and systems programming anti-patterns

rules.message: [architecture] Chained .clone() — consider borrowing or restructuring ownership
[architecture] Dynamic dispatch via Box<dyn> — consider generics or enum dispatch if hot path
[debugging-residue] #[allow(dead_code)] — remove unused code instead of suppressing warnings
[debugging-residue] todo!/unimplemented! macro — implement or remove before committing
[architecture] Relative path dependency — use workspace dependencies or publish to registry
